ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance recording */,
  "studio_test_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio test */,
  "record_name" TEXT /* Name of the recording */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "single_media_name" TEXT /* Name of the single media file (e.g., image, audio) */,
  "music_score_reading_completeness" REAL /* Completeness of music score reading (0-1) */,
  "bass_part_reading_completeness" REAL /* Completeness of bass part reading (0-1) */,
  "left_and_right_hand_integration_ability" INTEGER /* Integration ability of left and right hands (0-1) */,
  "all_recommended_time" INTEGER /* Recommended time for all parts (0-1) */,
  "rhythmic_stability" INTEGER /* Rhythmic stability (0-1) */,
  "bar_difficulty_ave" REAL /* Average difficulty of bars (0-1) */,
  "visual_stability" INTEGER /* Visual stability (0-1) */,
  "spectral_analysis_ability" INTEGER /* Spectral analysis ability (0-1) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who evaluated the performance */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "recording_location" TEXT /* Location of the performance */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor or system */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating for the performance */,
  "analysis_tool_used" TEXT /* Analysis tool or method used */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_participant_name FOREIGN KEY ("participant_name") REFERENCES participants ("participant_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., student, instructor, researcher) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the participant joined the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last date of activity */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument the participant plays */,
  "music_level" TEXT /* Music level of the participant (beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor associated with the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_files" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance the media file belongs to */,
  "media_name" TEXT /* Name of the media file */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of the media file (e.g., image, audio) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to a thumbnail image of the media file */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the media file (for audio files) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the media file (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each performance recording
Name of the single media file (e.g., image, audio)
Integration ability of left and right hands (0-1)
ID of the instructor who evaluated the performance
Feedback provided by the instructor or system
Role of the participant (e.g., student, instructor, researcher)
Date the participant joined the platform
Music level of the participant (beginner, intermediate, advanced)
ID of the instructor associated with the participant
Unique identifier for each media file
ID of the performance the media file belongs to
Type of the media file (e.g., image, audio)
File path to the media file
Size of the media file in MB
Path to a thumbnail image of the media file
Duration of the media file (for audio files)
Additional metadata about the media file (JSON format)
